sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50944" key="*)isei=a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἰσεῖα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἰσεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n50944.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Ἰσιεῖα, Ἰσιεῖον</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
